exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 2026-03-24 60kg × 9 — hold weight, focus on controlled ROM and tempo (3-1-2), no elbow flare

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 2026-04-13 50kg × 10 — hold weight, emphasise mind-muscle connection on upper back and lats

exercises.name: Cable Rear Delt Fly
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 2026-04-20 5kg × 10 — hold weight, strict form with controlled eccentric (3-sec), rear delt focus for shoulder balance

exercises.name: Barbell Curl
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 2026-04-13 25kg × 8 — hold weight, bring volume to MEV (8 sets biceps needed across week), tempo control

exercises.name: Cable One Arm Underhand Tricep Extension
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 2026-04-20 7.5kg × 10 — hold weight, shoulder-safe single-arm variation, continuous tension

notes: Shoulder rehab warm-up: band external rotations 2×15/arm + band pull-aparts 2×15 before session. Week 1 MEV introduction — all muscles start at MEV baseline. Tempo emphasis 3-1-2 (eccentric-pause-concentric), stop 3–4 reps from failure. Rear delt total this session = 3 sets (3 more on Friday to reach 6 sets/week). NO overhead pressing, NO lateral raises, NO dips due to active rotator cuff tear. Front delts receive ~4 sets indirect stimulus from bench press only. Consume 2800 kcal + 155g protein + ~150 kcal surplus to support MPS.
